request: Add usage-based invoicing for prepaid customers

specifications.title: Specification: Add usage-based invoicing for prepaid customers
specifications.summary: This specification captures the intent "Add usage-based invoicing for prepaid customers" against the analyzed codebase (1 file(s): 2 classs, 2 endpoints, 2 functions, 5 methods).
business_rules: The system must preserve the observable behaviour of `get_invoice_endpoint` (endpoint).
The system must preserve the observable behaviour of `create_invoice_endpoint` (endpoint).
The system must preserve the observable behaviour of `calculate_charges` (function).
All API endpoints must enforce authentication, authorization, and input validation before processing a request.
Every change must be delivered as a thin, independently testable slice with traceability back to this specification.

user_stories.want: the existing business logic captured as a reviewable specification
user_stories.benefit: I can extend the system without regressing current behaviour

user_stories.want: each requirement broken into acceptance criteria and tests
user_stories.benefit: delivery stays traceable from intent to implementation

acceptance_criteria.then: the request is rejected with a clear error and no side effects
